items.claim: Jose Delgado is the overall better fighter than Austin Bashy.
items.quote: I think Jose Delgado is the overall better fighter

items.claim: Austin Bashy will secure three or four takedowns against Jose Delgado.
items.quote: I do think he's going to be taken down three or four times in this matchup, if not more.

items.claim: The Oklahoma athletic commission is more likely to value control time and takedowns than the Nevada commission.
items.quote: I think because we are in Oklahoma, a commission that doesn't get a bunch of highlevel MMA fights, a state that actually cares about wrestling, I think Austin Bashy could steal a close one.

items.claim: Dioni Barbosa uses judo-based trips and throws from the clinch rather than shooting for takedowns.
items.quote: She'll throw tight strikes, look to get it to the ground. She is a judoa. So instead of shooting takedowns like a wrestler up the middle, she's going to tie you up into a clinch and then work in trips or throws.

items.claim: Anna Melisano is too inexperienced for a short-notice fight against a high-level opponent like Dioni Barbosa.
items.quote: But this is just too much too soon. Not only is this a short-noted stepup, it's a short notice step up against one of the tougher women in the division.

items.claim: Anna Melisano is a technical and aggressive striker who remains composed while moving forward.
items.quote: She can be a bit wild, but she does manage to stay technical and stay long while moving forward.
